cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
action_plan: Verify whether matching low-quality records exist for this place/acreage band. If none exist, mark the eval as expected_min_result_count=0 or broaden the prompt/eval to fair-or-low quality.
cases.next_action: Verify whether matching low-quality records exist for this place/acreage band. If none exist, mark the eval as expected_min_result_count=0 or broaden the prompt/eval to fair-or-low quality.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH ps AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet')
),
assr AS (
  SELECT TRIM("Parcel Number") AS parcel_number, TRIM(COALESCE("Utilities", '')) AS utilities
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet')
),
imp AS (
  SELECT parcel_number, condition_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_improvement_summary.parquet')
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.owner_name, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.improvement_building_count, imp.condition_codes
  FROM ps
  LEFT JOIN imp ON ps.parcel_number = imp.parcel_number
  WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
    AND ps.improvement_building_count > 0
    AND (imp.condition_codes IS NOT NULL AND (
      lower(imp.condition_codes) LIKE '%msl%' OR
      lower(imp.condition_codes) LIKE '%msf%' OR
      lower(imp.condition_codes) LIKE '%msa%' OR
      lower(imp.condition_codes) LIKE '%msg%'
    ))
)
SELECT parcel_number, situs_address, situs_city_state_zip, owner_name, land_use, acres, improvement_building_count, condition_codes
FROM filtered
ORDER BY acres DESC
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Parcels with Low Quality Existing Residential Dwellings and 1-3 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity, with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number, ps.acres, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.city_name, TRIM(a."Utilities") AS utilities
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
  AND ps.acres > 1
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND (ps.improvement_building_count IS NULL OR ps.improvement_building_count = 0)
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount, with acreage greater than 1, having utilities present, and no improvements recorded.

action_plan: The query returned more rows than the eval allows. Either add a deterministic LIMIT/order for this case or raise expected_max_result_count if the broader result set is acceptable.
cases.next_action: The query returned more rows than the eval allows. Either add a deterministic LIMIT/order for this case or raise expected_max_result_count if the broader result set is acceptable.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.owner_name, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.city_name, ps.improvement_building_count
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND ps.acres > 0
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
  AND (regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1) IN ('190', '910', '911', '940', '941'))
  AND regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1) NOT IN ('181', '140')
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels in Sedro-Woolley that are recreational or private vacant land, excluding mobile home leased properties, condominiums, public/civic/open-space parcels, zero-acre or no-geometry parcels, and parcels with residential dwelling evidence.
